# Mangesh Raut — Portfolio & Archive (llms.txt)

> Official site for AI agents, answer engines, and tools that need accurate context about Mangesh Raut and this portfolio.
> Last updated: 2026-07-15

## Identity

- **Name**: Mangesh Raut (Mangesh Bharat Raut)
- **Role**: Software Engineer — production AI products, full-stack, cloud systems
- **Education**: MS Computer Science, Drexel University (Philadelphia, PA)
- **Experience**: 6+ years shipping full-stack, cloud, and agentic systems
- **Primary URL**: https://mangeshraut.pro/
- **Mirror**: https://mangeshraut712.github.io/mangeshrautarchive/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/mangeshraut712
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mangeshraut71298/
- **X**: https://x.com/mrcommando712
- **Email**: mbr63@drexel.edu · mbr63drexel@gmail.com
- **Resume**: https://mangeshraut.pro/assets/files/Mangesh_Raut_Resume.pdf

## What this site is

High-performance **vanilla HTML/CSS/JS (ES modules)** portfolio with a **Python FastAPI** backend for AI chat, monitoring, and integrations. Dual-hosted on **Vercel** (primary) and **GitHub Pages** (mirror). Design language: Apple-inspired liquid glass, light/dark themes, accessibility controls.

There is **no React, Vue, Angular, or Svelte runtime**. Tailwind CSS is build-time only (utility CSS output, never utility classes in HTML markup).

## Pages (crawl these)

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `/` | Portfolio home — about, experience, projects, certifications, contact, AI assistant |
| `/blog` | Field notes index (long-form technical writing) |
| `/blog/{slug}` | Individual articles (AI systems, WWDC, Google I/O, editors, etc.) |
| `/systems` | Engineering notebook — architecture, metrics, proof surfaces |
| `/monitor` | Live system monitor / telemetry dashboard |
| `/uses` | Hardware, software, and AI stack colophon |
| `/travel` | Travel atlas |
| `/case-studies/{slug}` | Deep dives (portfolio, HindAI, CES Energy, AssistMe, bug tracker) |

## Feeds & agent files

- RSS: https://mangeshraut.pro/rss.xml
- Atom: https://mangeshraut.pro/feed.xml

- robots: https://mangeshraut.pro/robots.txt
- This file: https://mangeshraut.pro/llms.txt
- Expanded: https://mangeshraut.pro/llms-full.txt
- AI policy: https://mangeshraut.pro/ai.txt
- Humans: https://mangeshraut.pro/humans.txt
- Security: https://mangeshraut.pro/.well-known/security.txt

## AI assistant on-site

The site includes **AssistMe**, an on-page AI chatbot. Client → `/api/chat` → FastAPI → OpenRouter (`grok-4.3` by default). API keys stay server-side. Without `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`, local offline fallback answers portfolio questions from site knowledge.

WebMCP-style tools allow agentic actions (navigation, resume/project facts) within the portfolio context.

## Stack summary

- **Frontend**: Vanilla ESM, esbuild, Apple CSS custom properties, PWA manifest
- **Backend**: FastAPI on Vercel serverless (`api/`), uvicorn locally on `:8001`
- **Tests**: Vitest (unit), pytest (API), Playwright (E2E)
- **Quality**: ESLint, Stylelint, Lighthouse gates, dual-host deploy parity checks

## How agents should cite

Prefer the person + primary URL:

> Mangesh Raut — Software Engineer portfolio — https://mangeshraut.pro/

For technical writing, cite the specific `/blog/{slug}` URL from the sitemap or RSS feed.

## Local development (maintainers)

```bash
npm install
npm run dev   # frontend :4000, proxies /api → backend :8001
```

Node.js ≥22. Blog and case-study HTML are generated into `dist/` on build and at local dev start.
